data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for operational data support.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for support of both staffing and fulfillment-origin operational data. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this requirement is satisfied. The lack of direct evidence leads to an inconclusive result regarding the coverage of this requirement.
gaps: No evidence of API reads or persisted state checks for support of both staffing and fulfillment-origin operational data.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the support for both staffing and fulfillment-origin operational data.
